title: amaryllis × imperialis
intro: Amaryllis × imperialis, also known as the Naked Lady or Belladonna Lily, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its elegant white or white and yellow flowers, often fragrant and bell-shaped. The medicinal properties of Amaryllis × imperialis include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits associated with this plant include its possible use in treating colds and flu, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety due to its sedative properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are often used to make teas, tinctures, and other remedies, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity.
